beginner.title: What is Artificial Intelligence?
beginner.content: Artificial Intelligence enables machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence.
beginner.example: Examples: Chatbots, Face Unlock, Self Driving Cars

beginner.title: What is Machine Learning?
beginner.content: Machine Learning is a branch of AI where systems learn patterns from data.

advanced.title: Neural Networks
advanced.content: Neural networks are inspired by the human brain.

advanced.title: Deep Learning
advanced.content: Deep learning uses many hidden layers.
